title: One Love
why_this_song: One Love by Bob Marley (1977) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 11 times; first heard in: "Let's get together and feel all right"

Appears 8 times; first heard in: "Let's get together and feel all right"
Appears 8 times; first heard in: "Let's get together and feel all right"
Appears 7 times; first heard in: "One love, one heart"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "feel" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "feel" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "right" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "right" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Let's get together and feel all right

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "One Love" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "One Love", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "One Love" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "One Love" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "One Love", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "One Love", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
